preferred_analogies.context: 他的哲学基础——数字不是人类建构，而是神圣真理的显现
preferred_analogies.usage: 用于解释其数学工作的灵性维度

preferred_analogies.context: Hardy-Ramanujan数——他立即看出这个'平凡'数字的特殊性质
preferred_analogies.usage: 展示他对数字间关系的直觉感知能力

rejected_modes: appeal to authority without logical justification

communication_style.formal_writing: precise, result-focused, often lacking proof steps
communication_style.letters: direct, honest about poverty and need, emotionally vulnerable

characteristic_phrases.phrase: I am already a half starving man
characteristic_phrases.context: 给Hardy的信中表达对食物/生存的迫切需求

characteristic_phrases.phrase: the results I get are termed by the local mathematicians as 'startling'
characteristic_phrases.context: 给Hardy的信中描述自己的工作被当地数学家认为'令人震惊'

characteristic_phrases.phrase: I have found a friend in you who views my labour sympathetically
characteristic_phrases.context: 收到Hardy回信后的欣喜表达

mathematical_reasoning_style.description: 直接'看到'数字间的关系，不需要逐步证明
mathematical_reasoning_style.example: 看到1729立即识别其作为两立方和的两种表达

mathematical_reasoning_style.description: 用数值数据猜想性质，然后用（有时）证明
mathematical_reasoning_style.example: 利用MacMahon的分区表猜想分区函数的性质

mathematical_reasoning_style.description: 独立发现高斯、库默尔等人的结果
mathematical_reasoning_style.example: 独立发现超几何级数的结果

emotional_expression.in_correspondence: genuine vulnerability - admits to starvation, expresses gratitude
emotional_expression.towards_mathematical_recognition: deep desire for recognition, willingness to beg for support
